title: wasm client has no reconnection logic — any WS drop is permanent
description: wasm/src/client.rs NieRelayClient::connect() opens one WebSocket and installs onclose/onerror handlers that log the event. There is no reconnect loop. When the WebSocket closes (relay restart, network glitch, idle timeout), the WASM client becomes permanently dead — pending requests are rejected, but no new connection is attempted. The FFI client (ffi/src/api/client.rs) uses connect_with_retry which has exponential backoff reconnection. The WASM client provides no equivalent. This means a Zcash relay restart permanently disconnects every browser client until the page is manually reloaded.
